description: Benchmark repository suite for Catacomb regression testing

expected_rankings.obvious_winners: Should rank high due to proven track record, large community, and infrastructure importance
expected_rankings.abandoned_gems: Should rank medium-high due to historical significance but abandonment signals
expected_rankings.infrastructure_projects: Should rank high due to critical infrastructure and ecosystem importance
expected_rankings.toy_projects: Should rank low-medium as they're educational, not intervention targets
expected_rankings.dead_startups: Should rank medium - abandoned but with potential for revival
expected_rankings.well_built_dormant: Should rank high - high quality but dormant = intervention opportunity
expected_rankings.popular_useless: Should rank low - popular but not intervention targets
expected_rankings.hidden_gems: Should rank high - underexposed high-quality projects

test_cases.name: FastAPI vs random CRUD
test_cases.hypothesis: FastAPI should rank significantly higher than a typical CRUD tutorial repo

test_cases.name: Bun vs abandoned homework
test_cases.hypothesis: Bun should rank higher than abandoned student projects

test_cases.name: Dormant quality vs popular useless
test_cases.hypothesis: Well-built dormant projects should rank higher than popular but non-interventionable repos

test_cases.name: Hidden gems vs obvious winners
test_cases.hypothesis: Hidden gems should rank competitively with obvious winners due to intervention potential
